## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss pricing strategy and ROI modeling for a potential client deal.](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [$1,000 price difference shouldn't be make-or-break for a $60M+ company; lowering price risks anchoring future expectations](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Proposal to create standardized ROI case using competitor analysis and client-specific metrics](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Aim for ROI neutrality by month 3, showcasing long-term value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Topics

### Pricing Negotiation Challenges

  - [Client pushing for $5,000 instead of $6,000 monthly rate](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Marcel's view: $1,000 difference shouldn't be critical for serious businesses](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Concern: Lowering price may lead to undervaluing work and difficult client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Experience: Previous price concessions resulted in problematic engagements](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

### Client Profile and Budget

  - [Company size: Over $60 million in revenue](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Marketing activity: Running \~170 ads worldwide on Facebook](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Suggestion: Frame proposal as reallocation of $2,000-$3,000 from underperforming ad spend](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)

### Value Proposition

  - [Service equivalent to replacing two headcount positions](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [$9,000/month clients easier to manage, deliver same value as $4,000-$6,000 contracts](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Emphasis on long-term value buildup vs. short-term cost focus](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### ROI Model Development

  - [Proposal to create standardized ROI case for sales process](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Process:](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
    1.  Analyze top 10 competitors' search potential
    2.  Aggregate data, including Reddit analysis
    3.  Estimate client's current organic traffic value (e.g., $1-$2 per visitor)
    4.  Calculate conversion rates and average ticket size
    5.  Project ROI, aiming for neutrality by month 3 and significant value by month 12

### Communication Strategy

  - [Preference for direct messaging to ensure important information isn't missed](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Acknowledgment of multiple communication threads and potential for oversight](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nick to share existing ROI models as a starting point](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Marcel to conduct parallel analysis for ROI case](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Collaborate on finalizing a standardized ROI model for future sales processes](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Continue negotiation with client, emphasizing long-term value and ROI potential](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Follow up via DM to ensure critical information isn't overlooked in multiple threads](https://fathom.video/share/hzL31HDGnQn7BNzau2qADgJB7utQvd9w?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
